title: Power/Ability
Description
table-781-781.caption: List the powers of Hunter Zolomon.
data: Zolomon can move at speeds far exceeding those of normal humans.
Zolomon can manipulate his personal timeline, allowing him to appear to move at superhuman speeds.
His reflexes are enhanced to levels far exceeding those of normal humans.
Zolomon can withstand impacts and forces that would kill an ordinary human.
